form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign fifth of 13 at Southwell All Weather in the LR Golden Rose Stakes November 28 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Royal Zabeel with 59.5kg at $13. When resuming last campaign second last in a small field at Kempton Park All Weather November 5 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Coul Angel with 59kg at $15. Great chance.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at Kempton Park All Weather October 1 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Ten Pounds with 59.5kg at $13. When resuming last campaign sixth of 10 at Haydock Park April 26 over 1400m, 2 len behind Myal carrying 56.5kg at $8. This is an ideal race to kick off. In the right race and sure to go well.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of seven months. form.formComment: Back from a spell.
